Name: adb.exe
ParentCmd:
"C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe" -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8;
$script = Resolve-Path .\scripts\trace-adb-conflict-source.ps1; $adb='C:\Users\YaoFeng\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { param($s) powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $s -DurationSec 12 -PollMs 500 } -ArgumentList $script; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; & $adb kill-server | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700; & $adb start-server | Out-Null; Wait-Job $job | Out-Null; Receive-Job $job; Remove-Job $job"
